feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to control pre-defined asset class
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Hello.

I would like to know about pre-defined standard asset class.

How can I control that users cannot use standard asset classes?

I understand that it is not possible to change the pre-defined standard asset class.

I don't want users to use the standard asset classes, any suggestions?

 

Best Regards,

Nozomu

entry.title: How to deactivate cost center for cost element
entry.content: If a G/L account is a cost element, when I enter a posting with this account, the system will require me to enter a cost object, such as cost center. However, for some accounts like city tax, I don't want to allocate it to any cost center for cost analysis. So how can I deactivate this validation when I use this cost element account in SAP cloud?

entry.title: Freight Cost Allocation and Service Entry Sheet not generated while posting the Freight Accrual.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am using the S4/HANA Public Cloud TM solution for our client with 6w1, 6W2, 6W3, and 6W4 activated.

Based on my understanding, after the accrual posting by using the app Monitor Accrual Postings, the system is expected to generate the following documents:

Freight Cost Allocation
Purchase Order (PO)
Service Entry Sheet
I am able to create the Purchase Order → Freight Unit → Freight Order → Delivery successfully. However, when I try to post the document in the Monitor Accrual Postings app, the system posts the document but no Freight Cost calculation document is generated.

Additionally, upon checking the Manage Purchase Order app, I can see that the PO is being created in the background, but no Service Entry Sheet is being generated.

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

entry.title: API that can get Cost Center and Manager fields by querying with worker's email
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to get the cost center and manager fields from "Manage Workforce" fioir app by querying with worker's email in S4hana public cloud.

So, which API can get these all data?

If one API cannot get these all data at once, could you please provide the APIs that can get these data by querying with worker's email. 

Best Regards, 

Aye Chan

entry.title: Error message : Navigation is not supported for role XXX .
entry.content:
How can I view the details for a particular Role that is assigned to a Business Partner via Manage Business Partner Master Data App.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to create migration objects in PROD system.
entry.content:
Hello SAP support team,

Could you pls refer to standard and recommended SAP guideline of setting PROD system? Would be great to get SAP notes for creation of the migration objects in PROD system.

 

It is suggested to create migration objects in this order :

1.Bank

2.CO-Profit Center

3.CO-Profit Center (no clue why duplicate)

4.MM-supplier for contingent worker

5.EMP - employee

6.MM - Supplier

 

Our SAP partner requires to create their external accounts as internal customer users Employee (BUP003), because there is no other way how to create migration objects and check in PROD system.

The intention is to deactivate these accounts after PROD setup. However, are these accounts permanent or will we be able to delete them from PROD system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Deactivating SAP Credit Management Checks in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
• Do not want to use the SAP Credit Management to check the sales order check.
  • SAP Credit management should not block the creation of sales orders.
  • Sales orders are credit checked despite the un assignment of UKM000 role and credit segment to the customer.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to maintain Check Number in app, Auditor Direct Access - External Tax Audit
entry.content:
It's not clear how to make new check numbers.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order OData V4 doesn't return the characteristics with date type correctly
entry.content:
Hello

We're using Sales Order OData V4 API to get the characteristics in item level, and for all characteristics with CharcDataType = DATE, the value of the date is not showing in the GET call result.

For example, I have a characteristic populated with 01/30/2025 in SO 73 item 10, and when calling the OData:

{hostname}/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_salesorder/srvd_a2x/sap/salesorder/0001/SalesOrderItem(SalesOrder='73',SalesOrderItem='10')?$expand=_VariantConfiguration($expand=_Instance($expand=_Characteristic($expand=_AssignedValue($select=Characteristic,VarCnfCharacteristicValue,VarCnfCharcValueDescription))))

This is the characteristic piece of the result

{
                        "VarConfigurationBusObjectKey": "0000000073000010",
                        "VarConfigurationBusObjectType": "SalesOrderItem",
                        "VarConfignInstceInternalID": 1,
                        "Characteristic": "Z_HGM0400_040",
                        "CharcDataType": "DATE",
                        "CharcTemplate": "MM/DD/YYYY",
                        "Currency": null,
                        "CharcValueUnit": null,
                        "VarCnfCharcISOUnit": null,
                        "IsReadOnly": false,
                        "EntryIsRequired": false,
                        "CharcIsHidden": false,
                        "AdditionalValueIsAllowed": true,
                        "MultipleValuesAreAllowed": false,
                        "_AssignedValue": [
                            {
                                "VarConfigurationBusObjectKey": "0000000073000010",
                                "VarConfigurationBusObjectType": "SalesOrderItem",
                                "VarConfignInstceInternalID": 1,
                                "Characteristic": "Z_HGM0400_040",
                                "VariantConfigurationValueID": "1-",
                                "VarCnfCharacteristicValue": null,
                                "VarCnfCharcValueDescription": null
                            }
                        ]
                    }
Is this a standard behavior, if yes where I can see the 01/30/2025 value of the characteristic ?

Thanks & Regards,

Ahmed.

entry.title: Material requirements are transferred despite delivery block or credit block
entry.content:
It is not possible to block a sales order and prevent the corresponding transfer of requirements. 

The material requirement must not be transferred to the sales requirements list.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud, what is the solution/process for Excise and Duty calculations?
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I'm working with a spirits distiller/manufacturer in S/4HANA Public Cloud. They have both bonded and unbonded stock.

What is the excise and duty calculation process in S/4HANA Public Cloud to accurately calculate the tax and report it to UK HMRC government body?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to calculate depreciation as per Income Tax act for India Business in SAP Public cloud.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are facing issue while calculating depreciation as per Income tax Act for India Business.

Which depreciation key should be there for the asset master to compute depreciation as per Income Tax Act in the SAP public cloud as by default it is as per Useful Life of Fixed Assets.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - Custom CDS limit
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We must create a Custom CDS based on I_BILLINGDOCUMENTITEM. In our S/4 HANA Public Cloud System there will be half million data.

We what to know if there is a limit in data volume for Custom CDS View consumption exposed as Odata API.
There are some specific system limit? Data Volume limit or some Technical limit?
Do you suggest to consume the Odata API with filter or Top/Skip parameters?

 

KR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS view to link Supplier Invoice and corresponding accounting document
entry.content:
As we are developing PR to Payment report.
Here we want to fetch payment data with respect to supplier invoice.
We got CDS view to link Invoice accounting document and payment document(Clearing Document)
But, unable to find CDS view to link Supplier Invoice  to Accounting document
Please let us know , CDS view to link Supplier invoice to accounting document
Please help us in this regard


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error in Replication Flow in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an error while replicating data from S4 HANA Public Cloud to SAP Datasphere for master data cds via replication flow. Attaching the error screenshot.

 

Note: The DSP tenant is freshly setup so it could be something to do with the connection as well, But we have a communication scenario,Arrangment and User in Place.

entry.title: Assign multiple valuation methodes in FCV to one Valiualtion rule
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to use different valuation methods for various balance sheet items, identified by different Sem. Tags, within the same valuation run.

Specifically, I want to value all items with the SemTag "FX" using the "always valuate" method, and items with the SemTag "FX2" using the lower of cost or market principle.

 

SAP is giving me an error that you can't assign multiple valuation methods to one valuation rule. However, I can only link one valuation rule to my accounting principle.

 

How can I value different items differently in SAP?

Business Background:

Current assets should always be valued.

Loans, however, should be valued according to the lower of cost or market principle.

Alternative Solution:

Do you know a workaround?

I'm thinking of something like mirroring the foreign currency g/l job and running the loan valuations as a separate job. Is this possible?

Let me know if you need further assistance or clarification.

entry.title: Credit exposure incorrect data
entry.content:
Credit Exposure is not updated correctly for the customer.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: TM in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content: Is there any Transportation management module available in SAP S/4HANA public cloud solution?

entry.title: Purchase order stuck on Automatic approval in process
entry.content:
Hi community,

We create purchase order by using Manage Purchase Orders app on SAP Cloud Public.

We did not set up flexible workflow. Only automatic release is activated.

Since last Monday, each time we create new PO, status stays on Automatic Approval in process.

I checked on Flexible Workflow Admistration app in order to compare old PO (without problem of approval) and new PO (with problem). I can see some difference on log but I can't explain that.

First picture for old PO

Second picture for new PO

 

I saw some topics with same kind of issue but no answer to fix this problem.

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Posting Journal Entries with alternative accounts in SAP Public Cloud / S4 via API
entry.content:
Hello,

I've setup a correct JE entry transaction sending from an external system to a customer SAP S4 Cloud Public Edition, and I'm using this standard SAP API to integrate JE transactions into SAP via XML data:

Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous)

https://api.sap.com/api/JOURNALENTRYCREATEREQUESTCONFI/overview

However, since customer uses an alternative chart of accounts in SAP due to country financial requirements, it requested to change the integration to use alternative accounts instead of internal SAP accounts.

Is there any way to send these alternative accounts in the Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous) XML message?

Currently I'm using the XML tag <GLAccount> to send the internal SAP JE accounts but could find any tag to send alternative accounts...

Thanks
